name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN is a full-service pawn shop in Las Vegas offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, firearms lending, and discounted pre-owned merchandise.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a branded pawn shop chain with a location at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. in Las Vegas, NV. The store operates under the EZPAWN family of stores banner and positions itself as a community-oriented lender and retailer serving customers who need quick access to cash or affordable pre-owned goods. Store hours run Monday through Saturday 9am–7pm and Sunday 12pm–5pm, with a phone line at 702-383-0988 for local inquiries.

The store offers a broad range of financial and retail services. On the lending side, EZPAWN provides collateral-based pawn loans — customers bring in items of value and receive cash on the spot, with the option to redeem the item later. The store also buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, testing all precious metals to determine fair pricing. At this location, firearms are accepted as collateral for loans or purchased outright, with redemption subject to a background check. On the retail side, EZPAWN sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% below new retail prices, with new inventory arriving daily and an online shop for remote browsing.

Several features distinguish EZPAWN from a typical pawn shop. The EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to manage pawns, layaways, and reward points digitally — including making online payments on extensions and layaways — adding a layer of convenience not common at independent pawn operations. An Instant Quote tool on the website lets customers get an estimated value for their electronics before visiting. Flexible purchase options include both traditional layaway (10% down, monthly payments) and a Take Today program through third-party partners offering financing up to 12+ months for qualifying buyers. A Product Protection Plan and Jewelry VIP Program are also available at additional cost.

EZPAWN is a legitimate option for consumers who need fast cash and own items of value, or who want deeply discounted electronics and jewelry. However, the website does not disclose specific pawn loan interest rates, APRs, or fee structures — standard practice for pawn shops but a meaningful gap for comparison shoppers. Take Today financing requires credit eligibility, and not all services are available at every location. Borrowers should ask for full loan terms in writing before accepting any pawn transaction.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program enables online management of pawns, layaways, and points — uncommon in pawn retail
Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value before visiting the store
Pre-owned retail inventory priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new arrivals
Layaway available with only 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Firearms accepted as collateral or purchased outright at this Las Vegas location
Gold and diamond jewelry tested on-site to help ensure accurate, fair pricing
Take Today third-party financing offers up to 12+ months of deferred payment on purchases
cons: Pawn loan interest rates, APR, and fee structure are not disclosed on the website
Take Today flexible payment requires credit eligibility — not available to all customers
Firearms lending and purchasing only available at select store locations, not chain-wide
Online payments are restricted and not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (scope limitation for multi-state customers)
All merchandise is pre-owned with no manufacturer warranty; protection plans are an added cost
best_for: People who need same-day cash and own electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms to use as collateral
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name electronics, gaming gear, or jewelry at steep discounts
Gun owners looking for a collateral loan or outright sale of firearms
Gold and jewelry sellers who want an in-person appraisal with on-site metal testing
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who need fast cash against personal property or want heavily discounted pre-owned goods, particularly those who own electronics, jewelry, or firearms. The EZ+ digital tools and Instant Quote feature make it more convenient than most independent pawn shops. The main caveat is that loan costs — interest rates and fees — are not published online, so borrowers must evaluate terms in person before committing.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, cash on the spot)
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (25–70% off new retail)
Online shop with daily new inventory
EZ+ Rewards Program (digital pawn/layaway management, reward points)
Online payments for pawn extensions and layaways
Take Today third-party purchase financing (up to 12+ months)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, free cleaning)
